## What this repository is for

This repository contains the customized AzerothCore + Playerbot codebase that powers **Old Man Warcraft**.

On GitHub, we primarily use it for:

- public bug reports from players
- realm-related suggestions and feedback
- code contributions and maintainer workflows
- CI validation for changes to the server stack

This is **not** the primary distribution channel for players. For connection help, account tools, changelogs, and general support, use the OMW website.

## Where contributors should start

- Read [`CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md)
- Read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- Follow the issue and PR templates in this repository

## Attribution

Old Man Warcraft is built on top of AzerothCore WotLK 3.3.5a and related upstream projects. Please see [`AUTHORS`](../AUTHORS) for contributor credits already tracked in this repository.

- New AzerothCore-derived source components are released under the [GNU AGPL v3](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/agpl-3.0.en.html)
- Older source components derived from MaNGOS / TrinityCore remain under the [GNU GPL v2](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/old-licenses/gpl-2.0.en.html)

Old Man Warcraft is not affiliated with or endorsed by Blizzard Entertainment.
